recommendations.title: YES DAY
recommendations.overview: A mom and dad who usually say no decide to say yes to their kids' wildest requests — with a few ground rules — on a whirlwind day of fun and adventure.

recommendations.title: Maradona by Kusturica
recommendations.overview: A documentary on Argentinean soccer star Diego Maradona, regarded by many as the world's greatest modern player.

recommendations.title: Angel Face
recommendations.overview: 8-year-old Elli and her mother, Marlène, live in a small town by the French Riviera where they act out to relieve boredom and hide from social services. When Marlène caves in to yet another night of excess, she chooses to leave Elli behind for a man

recommendations.title: Black Cat, White Cat
recommendations.overview: A small-time hustler makes a deal with a notorious gangster to whom he owes money: marry his teenage son to the latter's daughter. However, the young lovers are not as agreeable.

recommendations.title: The Idea of You
recommendations.overview: 40-year-old single mom Solène begins an unexpected romance with 24-year-old Hayes Campbell, the lead singer of August Moon, the hottest boy band on the planet. As they begin a whirlwind romance, it isn't long before Hayes' superstar status poses unav

recommendations.title: When Father Was Away on Business
recommendations.overview: In a post-WWII Yugoslavia still under Stalinist rule in the 1950s, six-year-old Malik is oblivious as to why his father, Mehmed, has suddenly disappeared. In truth, Mehmed has been sent to a labor camp as punishment for acts of sexual indiscretion in

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: A woman's chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmother's dog.

recommendations.title: Sketch
recommendations.overview: When a young girl’s sketchbook falls into a strange pond, her drawings come to life—chaotic, real, and on the loose. As the town descends into chaos, her family must reunite and stop the monsters they never meant to unleash.

recommendations.title: Muriel, or the Time of Return
recommendations.overview: In the seacoast town of Boulogne, antique furniture saleswoman Hélène lives with her stepson, Bernard, who's back from military duty in Algiers. An old lover of Hélène's comes to visit, Alphonse, with his niece Françoise; he too is back from Algiers,

recommendations.title: This Man Must Die
recommendations.overview: When his young son is killed in a hit and run accident, Charles Thenier resolves to hunt down and murder the killer. By chance, Thenier makes the acquaintance of an actress, Helène Lanson, who was in the car at the time of the accident. He then meets
